title: batch
description: Groups multiple signal updates into a single computation pass.
param_fn_desc: Function containing signal updates. All updates are deferred until the function completes.
heading_record_sample: Committing a probe in one pass
usage_record_sample: When the uptime monitor records a probe, <0>recordSample</0> writes both <1>setSamples</1> and <2>setLastSweepAt</2> inside a single batch, so every memo and effect that reads them re-runs once instead of twice.
in_the_wild: See this batched write feed a live status page in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
